description: Full project backlog. Stories are pulled into increment sprint files by ceremonies/plan.md.
philosophy: Every increment leaves the repo in a state where something real can be verified. No story is complete without a passing behavioral test. Build little by little, always on green.

stories.title: ANDON: Restore broken GGE — Planning pipeline always has a pending increment
stories.description: GGE G5 indicator is failing. Add a pending increment to manifest.json.
acceptanceCriteria: GGE G5 indicator passes: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('prd/manifest.json')); pending=[i for i in m.get('increments',[]) if i.get('status')=='pending']; assert len(pending)>=1; print('OK')"

stories.title: Monorepo restructure: contract/, cluster/kind/, platform/
stories.description: Establish the clean separation between cluster provider and platform. Create contract/v1/cluster.schema.yaml, cluster/kind/ skeleton, platform/ with deploy.sh. Archive all non-kind providers. This story is the rough shape — subsequent stories make each layer operational.
acceptanceCriteria: contract/v1/cluster.schema.yaml exists and is valid YAML
python3 contract/validate.py contract/v1/tests/valid.yaml exits 0
python3 contract/validate.py contract/v1/tests/invalid-egress-not-blocked.yaml exits 1 with AUTARKY VIOLATION message
cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh exists and passes shellcheck -S error
platform/deploy.sh exists and passes shellcheck -S error
bootstrap/providers/ is removed from working tree (archived in git history)
All platform charts are under platform/charts/
All cluster charts are under cluster/kind/charts/

stories.title: kind cluster bootstrap produces a valid cluster-values.yaml
stories.description: cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh runs end-to-end on a developer machine. Produces cluster-values.yaml that passes contract validation. Kind cluster has 3 nodes, Cilium CNI (kindnet disabled), cert-manager, sealed-secrets, local-path-provisioner, MinIO.
acceptanceCriteria: ./cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh --dry-run exits 0
./cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh runs without error on a clean machine
kind get clusters shows sovereign-test
kubectl get nodes shows 3 nodes all Ready
python3 contract/validate.py cluster-values.yaml exits 0
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager shows all Running
kubectl get pods -n sealed-secrets shows all Running
kubectl get pods -n minio shows all Running
kubectl get storageclass shows local-path as default

stories.title: Egress is blocked in kind cluster — autarky invariant verified
stories.description: After KIND-001, verify that the autarky.externalEgressBlocked invariant actually holds. Apply a Cilium egress deny policy and confirm test pods cannot reach the internet.
acceptanceCriteria: A CiliumClusterwideNetworkPolicy denying external egress is applied
kubectl run egress-probe --image=busybox --restart=Never -- wget -q --timeout=5 https://1.1.1.1 exits non-zero (blocked)
Internal pod-to-pod communication still works after the policy is applied
Policy is applied as part of cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh (not a manual step)

stories.title: platform/deploy.sh installs cert-manager and verifies it issues a certificate
stories.description: First working step of deploy.sh. Reads cluster-values.yaml, validates contract, installs cert-manager into the kind cluster, and verifies it can actually issue a certificate. This is the first behavioral test — not just 'pods running' but 'it does its job'.
acceptanceCriteria: ./platform/deploy.sh --cluster-values cluster-values.yaml --only cert-manager exits 0
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager shows all Running
A test Certificate resource is created and reaches Ready=True within 60s
kubectl get certificate -n cert-manager-test shows READY=True

stories.title: platform/deploy.sh installs sealed-secrets and verifies seal/unseal works
stories.description: deploy.sh installs sealed-secrets. Behavioral test: seal a secret, commit the sealed version, unseal it in the cluster, verify the plaintext is recovered.
acceptanceCriteria: ./platform/deploy.sh --cluster-values cluster-values.yaml --only sealed-secrets exits 0
kubectl get pods -n sealed-secrets shows all Running
kubeseal encrypts a test secret successfully
The sealed secret is applied to the cluster and decrypts to the correct value

stories.title: Harbor deploys and images can be pushed to it
stories.description: The autarky bootstrap window closes here. deploy.sh installs Harbor. After it's running, vendor/push-all.sh pushes all platform images to Harbor. From this point, no workload pulls from external registries.
acceptanceCriteria: ./platform/deploy.sh --cluster-values cluster-values.yaml --only harbor exits 0
kubectl get pods -n harbor shows all Running
curl https://harbor.sovereign.local/api/v2.0/ping returns 200 (via port-forward)
docker push harbor.sovereign.local/sovereign/test:latest succeeds
G6 GGE passes: no external registry references in platform/charts/harbor/templates/

stories.title: Keycloak deploys and issues an OIDC token
stories.description: deploy.sh installs Keycloak. Behavioral test: authenticate against the sovereign realm and get a valid JWT back.
acceptanceCriteria: ./platform/deploy.sh --cluster-values cluster-values.yaml --only keycloak exits 0
kubectl get pods -n keycloak shows all Running
curl the token endpoint returns a valid JWT (via port-forward)
The sovereign realm exists in Keycloak

stories.title: GitLab deploys and accepts a git push
stories.description: deploy.sh installs GitLab. Behavioral test: create a repo, push a commit, verify it appears in GitLab.
acceptanceCriteria: ./platform/deploy.sh --cluster-values cluster-values.yaml --only gitlab exits 0
kubectl get pods -n gitlab shows all Running within 5 minutes
git push to gitlab.sovereign.local/root/test-repo succeeds
The commit appears in the GitLab UI (verified via API)

stories.title: ArgoCD deploys and syncs a manifest from GitLab
stories.description: deploy.sh installs ArgoCD. Behavioral test: create an ArgoCD Application pointing at a GitLab repo, push a manifest, verify ArgoCD syncs it to the cluster. This is the GitOps handoff — after this story, ArgoCD manages all subsequent platform upgrades.
acceptanceCriteria: ./platform/deploy.sh --cluster-values cluster-values.yaml --only argocd exits 0
kubectl get pods -n argocd shows all Running
An ArgoCD Application pointing at a test GitLab repo is created
Pushing a ConfigMap manifest to the GitLab repo causes ArgoCD to sync it within 3 minutes
kubectl get configmap -n argocd-test shows the synced resource

stories.title: Observability stack deploys and scrapes a metric
stories.description: deploy.sh installs Prometheus + Grafana. Behavioral test: query the Prometheus API and verify it returns a metric from the cluster (kube_node_info or similar).
acceptanceCriteria: ./platform/deploy.sh --cluster-values cluster-values.yaml --only prometheus-stack exits 0
kubectl get pods -n monitoring shows all Running
curl prometheus:9090/api/v1/query?query=up returns results with data
Grafana is reachable and shows the Prometheus datasource as healthy
